core_concept: Healthy Eating: Different Foods Keep the Body Strong and Growing
facts: Eating different kinds of foods — fruits, vegetables, grains, and protein — helps the body grow strong because each type gives something different the body needs, not just one thing.
Water helps the body use food for energy, so drinking water every day is just as important as eating healthy foods.
misconceptions: Preschoolers often think that eating only their favorite healthy food, like fruit, is enough to stay strong and grow, not realizing the body needs a variety of different foods.
